content: Flora Executor v1.1.0 is now available!

embeds.title: Flora Executor v1.1.0
embeds.description: A powerful Roblox script executor with a modern UI and advanced features.

fields.name: What's New
fields.value:
- **Notification System**: Dismissible notifications with 3-second fade timer
- **Settings Persistence**: Settings save to settings.dat (AlwaysOnTop, TextSize, AutoAttach)
- **Join Discord Button**: Added Discord link in navigation
- **Custom Title Bar**: Removed Windows title bar, added custom minimize/exit buttons
- **Window Dragging**: Entire window is now draggable
- **Rounded Corners**: 10px rounded corners on window
- **UI Decluttering**: Reduced spacing, collapsible log terminal
- **Button Improvements**: Centered Lower Class buttons with consistent spacing
- **Window Size**: Changed to 1100x550 (wider, shorter)
- **Build Output**: Renamed to Flora.exe

fields.name: How to Use
fields.value:
1. Download FloraUpdater.exe
2. Run the updater
3. Select installation directory (or use default)
4. Click Install/Update
5. Extract the downloaded ZIP file
6. Run Flora.exe
7. Attach to Roblox and execute scripts

fields.name: System Requirements
fields.value:
- Windows 10 or later
- Roblox installed
- Administrator privileges (recommended)

fields.name: Notes
fields.value:
- First run requires manual ZIP extraction
- Updater checks for updates automatically
- Close Roblox before updating

fields.name: Detection Status
fields.value:
Currently Updated to LATEST ROBLOX VERSION
Currently Around 85% UNC
Currently FULLY undetectable
